character.bio: The successor of Shiranui-style ninja arts. A charming kunoichi who is as dedicated to love as she is to training. Loves cooking, Japanese dressmaking, flower arrangement, and traditional Japanese dance.

mai_st_hk.note: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack missesProduces a crumple stun on Punish Counter, and +22 frame advantage

mai_cr_mp.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

mai_cr_hk.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses1 frame of recovery added when blocked

mai_j_mp.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

mai_hien_ren_kyaku_2.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

mai_hien_ren_kyaku_3.note: Can transition to Musasabi no Mai (Overdrive included) or Air Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi between frames 18 and 33Considered airborne from frames 10 - 35

mai_hoshi_kujaku_1.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

mai_hoshi_kujaku_2.note: Fully invincible from frames 10 - 58 on hit only

mai_musasabi.note: 7 frames of recovery added when the attack misses10 frames of recovery added when the attack misses and characters switch sidesRecovery on block changes depending on the height of the attack when it is blocked

mai_sa1.context: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)
mai_sa1.input: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
mai_sa1.note: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 8Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

mai_sa1_boosted.note: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 6Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

mai_sa2.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 8Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

mai_sa2_boosted.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 8Projectile invincibility from frames 9 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

mai_sa3.displayName: SA3 Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura
mai_sa3.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
mai_sa3.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
mai_sa3.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 11The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

mai_ca.displayName: CA Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura

mai_ca.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
mai_ca.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 11The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

mai_throw_f.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

mai_throw_b.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

mai_throw_air.input: (During a jump) (When near opponent) LP + LK
mai_throw_air.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

mai_drive_impact.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks between frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

mai_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
mai_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
mai_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

mai_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

mai_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
mai_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
mai_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

mai_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

mai_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

mai_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

mai_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
mai_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
